objective: Check public and already-known external source-label candidates for an independent MainRegimeV2 root-label panel covering the ready yfinance/Kraken full symbol/timeframe matrix.

source_candidates.useful_for: possible daily stock/index Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis-style source-label evidence
source_candidates.blocking_gap: not a full ready-provider matrix for yfinance plus Kraken; not all requested symbols/timeframes/cycles are attachable; prior accepted packets already consume the usable subset as sampled evidence

source_candidates.useful_for: large time-series dataset with a regime_label column and OHLCV-derived fields
source_candidates.blocking_gap: IDX/narrow-market panel with label encoding not proven equivalent to MainRegimeV2 Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis; includes target/future fields and does not attach to the yfinance/Kraken matrix

source_candidates.useful_for: official recession/expansion timing for U.S. macro Crisis-style context
source_candidates.blocking_gap: monthly/daily recession dummy only; does not label Bull/Bear/Sideways, crypto, futures, ETFs, or intraday cycles

source_candidates.candidate: Mirtaheri et al. crypto social manipulation source
source_candidates.useful_for: direct crypto manipulation event/social overlay evidence
source_candidates.blocking_gap: direct Manipulation overlay only; not a main price-regime root label panel and not attachable to OHLCV root cells

source_candidates.candidate: Xu and Livshits pump-and-dump event source
source_candidates.useful_for: direct pump-and-dump event context for manipulation research
source_candidates.blocking_gap: event manipulation source only; not Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis root labels and not full species/cycle coverage
